title: Majestic (disambiguation)
content:
'''''Majestic''''' may refer to:

==Canon==
*The '''''[[Majestic]]''''', an [[Galactic Empire|Imperial]] [[starship]]

==Legends==
*The '''[[Majestic (Acclamator-class)|''Majestic'']]''', an [[Acclamator-class assault ship|''Acclamator''-class assault ship]]
*The '''[[Majestic (Venator-class)|''Majestic'']]''', a [[Venator-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Venator''-class Star Destroyer]]
*The '''[[Majestic (Imperial-class)|''Majestic'']]''', an [[Imperial I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial I''-class Star Destroyer]]
*The '''[[Majestic (pirate ship)|''Majestic'']]''', a [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] ship
*The '''[[Majestic (passenger liner)|''Majestic'']]''', a [[Passenger liner/Legends|passenger liner]]
*The '''[[Majestic-class heavy cruiser|''Majestic''-class heavy cruiser]]'''
*The '''''[[Majestic Gundark]]''''', a [[YT-1300 light freighter/Legends|YT-1300 light freighter]]

{{Disambig}}
